summary: Block 27 UI refactor testing complete. All features working correctly: Collection page tabs (The Hive/Wishlist), Dream Debt banner, Wishlist promotion, Honeypot Wantlist tab with header tagline, and VariantTag modes.
seed_data_creation: TEST_Promote_Artist/TEST_Promote_Album ISO created for promote flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Block 27 UI refactor complete. All features verified: (1) Collection page has 'The Hive' tab for owned records and 'Wishlist' tab for dreaming items, (2) Wishlist tab shows Dream Debt banner with 'In your dreams...' copy, 'Certified Delusional' badge logic working (shows when value > $5000), (3) WishlistCard has 'Ready to Buy?' button calling PUT /api/iso/{id}/promote endpoint, (4) Honeypot tab renamed to 'Wantlist' with 'The Hunt is On' header tagline, (5) VariantTag component has glass/ghost/gold modes with proper data-testid attributes.

backend: test_promote_nonexistent_iso_returns_404 - Returns 404 for invalid ISO id
test_get_user_isos - GET /api/iso returns user's ISO items
test_iso_items_have_status_field - ISO items have status field (OPEN/WISHLIST/FOUND)
test_promote_changes_status_from_wishlist_to_open - Promotion changes status to OPEN with HIGH priority
test_iso_and_valuation_wishlist_consistency - Valuation total_count matches ISO WISHLIST count
frontend: Collection page has 'The Hive (N)' tab for owned records (data-testid='tab-owned')
Collection page has 'Wishlist (N)' tab for dreaming items (data-testid='tab-wishlist')
Wishlist tab shows Dream Debt banner with 'In your dreams...' copy (data-testid='dream-debt-banner')
'Certified Delusional' badge not visible when value <= $5000 (correct behavior)
WishlistCard has 'Ready to Buy?' button with gold gradient styling
Wantlist tab has 'The Hunt is On.' header tagline (data-testid='wantlist-header')

frontend_collection_page.the_hive_tab: Tab labeled 'The Hive (N)' showing owned records with value banner, gems, search, sort
frontend_collection_page.wishlist_tab: Tab labeled 'Wishlist (N)' with Cloud icon showing Dream Debt banner
frontend_collection_page.dream_debt_banner: Shows 'In your dreams...' copy, Total Value of Dreams, item count
frontend_collection_page.wishlist_card: Has ghost variant pill and 'Ready to Buy?' promote button

frontend_honeypot_page.header_tagline: 'The Hunt is On.' with supporting text

variant_tag_component.glass_mode: data-testid='variant-pill-glass' - blur backdrop, dark bg, white text
variant_tag_component.ghost_mode: data-testid='variant-pill-ghost' - outlined, transparent bg, stone colors
variant_tag_component.gold_mode: data-testid='variant-pill-gold' - gold gradient bg, amber-950 text
variant_tag_component.prefix_prop: Supports prefix like 'Dreaming of' for wishlist items
